artPrompt: A single oversized mutant raccoon caught mid-sprint atop a toppled garbage can in steep foreshortening, masked face snarling toward the viewer, paws flung wide, trash scattering in its wake. Rust-red and murky-green fur slick with reservoir runoff, crumbling pipes behind under a bruised stormy sky, sickly bioluminescent glint in its eyes, pure haste and motion, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Runoff Raccoon
text:
Haste
Whenever Runoff Raccoon attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each snack on the table. (It is here for the snacks. It is always here for the snacks.)
flavorText: Knocked over every garbage can in Whateverville. Twice the size it should be. Coincidence?
